doctrine: The verification gate is fail-closed: a claim derives `verified` ONLY from >=2 independent matched verifier attachments (different method/solver, with >=1 declaring independent_of another in the set; the declaration is one-directional by necessity because the vva_ id content-addresses independent_of, so a mutual 2-cycle is unconstructable) plus a surviving adversarial probe; a refuted probe forces `refuted`; everything else is `needs_verification`. A self-reported `accepted` with no attachments is needs_verification, never verified. These vectors pin that contract for any implementation of derive_gate_status. attachments[].independent_of lists EARLIER indices in this vector's array.

gate_status_vectors.name: zero attachments fails closed
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: single attachment is not independence
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: two independent matched attachments with a surviving probe verify
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: two attachments same method/solver are not independent
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: passed but unmatched to the claim counts for nothing
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: a refuting adversarial probe forces refuted
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

gate_status_vectors.name: independent + matched but no probe is not enough
gate_status_vectors.claim: a Sidon set of size 33 in {0,1}^8

grade_gate_vectors.name: solve-language on a non-solve grade is blocked
grade_gate_vectors.claim: this resolves #647 with an improved bound

honest grade without solve-language passes
